perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a beige fleece jacket and fluffy earmuffs walking on a Paris sidewalk, holding an exceptionally large croissant. The Eiffel Tower and classic Parisian architecture are visible. (2) A quick montage follows, showing her posing with the giant croissant in front of the Eiffel Tower and other scenic city spots, holding it over her head and smiling. (3) The scene shifts indoors to a bright, white setting where she takes large bites of the croissant, drinks from a massive bowl-sized cup, and eventually shows herself having finished or nearly finished the pastry with a satisfied and slightly tired expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo French-inspired accordion music starts immediately, establishing a cheerful atmosphere. No vocals are present. (2) The music continues with a steady beat as the visual scene cuts rapidly between outdoor landmarks. Faint ambient street sounds are masked by the BGM. (3) Throughout the indoor eating sequence, the same music persists. Occasional high-pitched chime sound effects (SFX) are used to emphasize text appearances or funny expressions. No spoken dialogue is detected.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'POV: 真的有人吃完巨型可可頌?!' (POV: Does anyone actually finish a giant croissant?!) - Hook/Question, curious tone. (2) Decorative Text: '來巴黎就是耍...' (Coming to Paris is just for...) - Playful tone. (3) Functional/Decorative Text: '(好好吃)' (Delicious), '(喝一口茶)' (Take a sip of tea), '居然真的吃完了!' (Actually finished it!) - Surprised and satisfied tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro with prop -> Landmark montage -> Eating challenge/demo -> Successful conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, approximately 7 passers-by in the background of the outdoor scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair tied back, wearing large beige fluffy earmuffs, sunglasses, a beige fleece jacket with brown trim, and white sweatpants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Outdoor backgrounds feature the Eiffel Tower, iron park fences, and Parisian street lamps. The indoor background is a clean, minimalist white environment with a wooden table.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight for outdoors; bright, soft studio-style lighting for indoors.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Travel Showcase -> Action -> Result
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to entertain and showcase a 'giant food' novelty experience in Paris. By combining the visual spectacle of an oversized croissant with iconic landmarks and a successful eating challenge, it creates engaging 'lifestyle/travel' content typical of short-form social media platforms.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific bakery or brand name is explicitly mentioned or tagged as a promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-contrast visual hook using giant food props.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'POV' hook and the absurdity of the object size to drive retention and shares.
